system.description:
### Tier 1 Social A maze of red neon-lit alleys, filled with criminals, toxic smoke, and illicit opportunities Impulses: Exploit the desperate, hide the truth in smoke, spread corruption

#### Features Plague Vector - Countdown: Setup a Countdown (6) named "Epidemic." When it triggers, the localized plague flares up; all PCs must mark 1d4 Stress and become Vulnerable until they receive medical attention or leave the environment.

What symptoms does the disease manifest first? How do the locals react to outsiders showing signs of infection?

Shakedown - Action: Spend a Fear. A local gang corners the party or a specific PC, demanding a toll (credits, gear, or a favor). If the PCs refuse or fail a Presence Reaction Roll (11), the gang attacks or alerts nearby enemies.

Which faction controls this specific alley? What happens if you refuse to pay?

Toxic Smog - Reaction: When a PC rolls Failure with Fear, the ventilation systems fail. The area fills with choking gas. PCs must make a Strength Reaction Roll (11) or suffer 2 Stress from the fumes.

Does the smoke smell of chemicals or decay? How does it obscure your vision? }}
